name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Session-isolated Codex telemetry with a local Usage Advisor, Guard, History, dock, and message footers.

interface.shortDescription: Local token, quota, and context telemetry
interface.longDescription: Shows session-isolated Codex usage telemetry, local token-saving advice, privacy-safe history, alerts, and verified message footers without adding monitor text to model context.
defaultPrompt: Show my Codex usage monitor status.
